name: Off-Mic Premium Supporter
description: Top-tier Off-Mic pilot supporter - name in show notes, signed pilot poster, monthly ask-me-anything voice note. ZAR 1000.

name: Off-Mic Founding Supporter
description: Founding Off-Mic supporter - name in show notes, early episode access, founding-listener badge. ZAR 500.

name: Off-Mic Standard Supporter
description: Standard Off-Mic supporter - early episode access, supporter newsletter. ZAR 250.

name: Off-Mic Early Bird Supporter
description: Early Bird Off-Mic supporter - supporter newsletter, launch-week thank you. ZAR 150.

name: Off-Mic Custom Pledge
description: Custom Off-Mic supporter pledge - listener-chosen amount above Early Bird. Perks matched to nearest tier.
